title: ICAR IIPR Recruitment 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for 02 Young Professional II Posts
description: ICAR Institute of Pulses Research (IIPR) has announced the official notification for the recruitment of 02 Young Professional II Jobs. Candidates with post-graduation can use this chance and apply for the ICAR IIPR Recruitment 2026 . Here, we have included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, educational details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can attend the walk-in at the address below. If you are looking for more, here is...
